name: io.github.mlava/scholar-sidekick-mcp
title: Scholar Sidekick
description: Catch AI-fabricated citations (real DOI + fake title). Retraction, open-access, 10,000+ CSL styles.

environmentVariables.description: Not required. Scholar Sidekick works fully anonymously with no key and no signup — leave this unset for normal use. Set it only to raise rate limits and enable the verifier's optional LLM screen. Free first-party ssk_ key from https://scholar-sidekick.com/account; sent as Authorization: Bearer.
environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Not required, and not the normal way to use this server — anonymous access is the default and needs no key at all. Only for customers on a paid RapidAPI plan; when set, calls route through the RapidAPI gateway instead of the direct API. https://rapidapi.com/scholar-sidekick-scholar-sidekick-api/api/scholar-sidekick
environmentVariables.name: RAPIDAPI_KEY
